from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import select
from models import User


def update_user_statuses(session: Session, user_ids: list[int], new_status: str) -> None:
    users = session.execute(select(User).where(User.id.in_(user_ids))).scalars().all()
    for user in users:
        user.status = new_status
    session.commit()


def deactivate_inactive_users(session: Session, inactive_days: int) -> int:
    users = session.execute(select(User).where(User.last_login < inactive_days)).scalars().all()
    for user in users:
        user.active = False
    session.commit()
    return len(users)


def bulk_update_emails(session: Session, updates: list[dict]) -> None:
    user_ids = [u["user_id"] for u in updates]
    users = session.execute(select(User).where(User.id.in_(user_ids))).scalars().all()
    user_map = {u.id: u for u in users}
    for update in updates:
        user_map[update["user_id"]].email = update["new_email"]
    session.commit()
